overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in winter clothing exploring a snowy mountain ski resort. The character walks through covered walkways, open plazas, ascends outdoor stairs, crosses a road, and hikes up snow-covered slopes toward a wooden cabin.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone walkway between resort buildings

events.description: exits covered stone walkway into open snow area

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered stone walkway toward the exit

entered.detail: beige resort building with stone base and wooden accents
covered passage with stone walls and arched ceiling
stone arch entrance at the end of the walkway
rectangular wooden planters with green bushes

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered stone walkway between resort buildings. The passage has stone walls and a wooden ceiling, with planters containing bushes along the sides. The character approaches the archway exit where daylight and a red building become visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow plaza at ski resort base

events.description: approaching the base of a large outdoor staircase

agents.ego_description: walking across open snow toward a large staircase with wooden railings

entered.detail: multi-story red building with multiple windows
long outdoor staircase with wooden side railings leading uphill
metal ski lift support tower visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a bright snow-covered plaza. A large red resort building stands on the left while the character walks toward a grand outdoor staircase ahead. Ski lift towers are visible in the distance against the clear blue sky.

events.description: begins ascending the long flight of stone stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the outdoor stone stairs with wooden railings on both sides

entered.detail: wooden handrails lining both sides of the staircase
concrete stair steps with snow on the edges

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a long flight of outdoor stone stairs flanked by wooden handrails. Snow banks line both sides of the staircase. As the character climbs, the view opens up to show trees and a yellow building visible at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow path leading to resort road crossing

events.description: moving from road back onto snow-covered terrain

agents.ego_description: walking through snow, crossing an asphalt road, and continuing toward buildings

entered.detail: two-story yellow building with arched doorways
paved road with yellow dividing lines
stone and metal bridge crossing over the road
ski lift cables and chairs passing overhead

segments.scene_description: After reaching the top of the stairs, the character walks across a snow-covered area toward a yellow building. The character crosses an asphalt road beneath a stone bridge overpass, with ski lift cables visible overhead. The terrain transitions back to deep snow as the character approaches a wooden cabin in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountainside path with pine trees

events.description: beginning to ascend the snowy hillside

agents.ego_description: hiking up a snow-covered slope toward a wooden cabin surrounded by pine trees

entered.detail: rustic brown wooden cabin with snow on the roof
tall evergreen pine trees lining the snowy path

segments.scene_description: The character walks up a snow-covered hillside surrounded by dense pine trees. A wooden mountain cabin grows larger as the character approaches, with ski lift towers visible to the right. The path continues upward through the pristine snow toward the cabin and distant mountain peaks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered corridors of a resort into an expansive, snow-covered mountain landscape. It begins within a covered stone walkway with a wooden ceiling, moving past planters toward a bright archway exit. As the character emerges, the scene opens into a sunlit plaza featuring a large red building and distant ski lift towers under a clear blue sky. The camera then follows the ascent up a long flight of stone stairs flanked by snow banks, eventually crossing an asphalt road beneath a stone bridge as the terrain shifts toward deeper snow. Finally, the path leads upward through a dense pine forest, climbing a pristine hillside toward a wooden mountain cabin set against a backdrop of distant peaks.
